Final documents (receipts, updated searches, invoice) are made available in the client area. Input documents follow the retention rules in the Privacy notice.
12. Personal data processing
Data processing is described in the Privacy notice on the site, which constitutes an integral part of these Terms.
13. Changes
The professional may amend these Terms; the relationship is governed by the version accepted at purchase, unless changes are required by law.
14. Applicable law, venue and dispute resolution
Italian law applies to the contract. For consumers the mandatory venue of residence remains. Online dispute resolution (ODR) is available via the European platform.
Cookie Policy
The cookies and similar technologies we use, and how to manage your consents.
How we manage consent
Consent is collected via the site banner: non-essential cookies stay off until you accept. You can change your choice anytime from "Cookie preferences" in the footer.
What cookies are
Cookies are small text files that sites save on your device to make them work, remember preferences or — with consent — collect statistics.
Categories we use
Category
What they are for
Basis / consent
Technical / necessary
Site operation, security, client-area session, language preference storage.
Always on (no consent required)
Analytics (Google Analytics 4)
Aggregate statistics on how the site is used to improve it. With Consent Mode, tags stay in denied mode until consent.
Only with prior consent
Marketing
Measuring advertising campaigns and attribution (e.g. Google Ads). Not currently active by default without consent.
How you manage consent
On first visit a banner lets you accept or refuse non-essential cookies, with separate choices. You can reopen preferences from the footer.
Disabling in the browser
You can also manage or delete cookies in your browser settings. Disabling technical cookies may limit site functions.

The promise
We want you to feel at ease from start to finish. That is why, beyond legal protections (withdrawal), we offer an extra commercial guarantee on our work.
You report the issue by writing to us or from your client area.
We review the situation together, transparently.
If it falls within covered cases, we proceed with a refund using the same payment method, within the stated times.
Guarantee and withdrawal are two different things
Withdrawal is your legal right in the first 14 days (see Withdrawal page). The guarantee is an extra promise we make on the quality of our work.
What it does not cover
Taxes and duties owed to the State (they are not our fee and have no mark-up).
Delays or outcomes due to incorrect, incomplete or late documents from the client.
Times and decisions of third parties (Agenzia delle Entrate, Cadastre, banks).
